params.Description: As long as you control eight or more lands, CARDNAME gets +5/+5.

params.StackDescription: Each other creature {p:You} controls becomes a copy of {c:Targeted} until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary.
params.SpellDescription: Choose target creature you control. Each other creature you control becomes a copy of it until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary if the chosen creature is legendary.

remaining_params.StackDescription: Each other creature {p:You} controls becomes a copy of {c:Targeted} until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: Choose target creature you control. Each other creature you control becomes a copy of it until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary if the chosen creature is legendary.
